problem: l/h and r/h prop governor lever friction plates broken.
action: removed and replaced l/h and r/h i/b friction plates for prop governor levers with new. ops check good.

problem: Prop mounting bolts safety cable on multiple bolts is loose.
action: Checked prop bolt torque and resafetied

problem: LH prop dome pressure is low
action: Serviced LH prop dome pressure with N2.

problem: Safety wire on two of the prop mounting bolts is loose.
action: Torque Checked Two Prop Bolts That Had Loose Safety Wire. Re-Safetied All Six Prop Bolts.
Removed spinner. Removed Propeller P/N 76EM8S14-0-62 S/N 105794K.

problem: L/H Engine Prop Cable Clamp Chaffing.
action: Removed and replaced L/H Engine prop cable clamp with new

problem: Prop levers moved together when doing engine securing.
action: Found two of the friction plates for the prop levers broken. Removed and replaced the 2 broken friction plates for the prop levers. Prop levers move smoothly independently.
